metadata.description: dte-rails-toolkit — general-purpose runnable Rails checkers (deterministic linters), a staging home until a category graduates into its own plugin.

plugins.name: dte-rails-toolkit
plugins.description: Runnable, deterministic Rails checkers verified both ways (truthful on a real app, flags a synthetic break): layer-boundary-lint (Rails layering violations) + rails-test-smell-checker (Minitest + RSpec test smells). More to come; categories extract into focused plugins once mature.
